Beverage.description: The cornerstone of social gatherings. Will surely buzz up your mood with a [BOLD] surge of confidence.
Locally made red wine from selected grapes. [RICH] with antioxidant and many more benefits if drunk in moderation.
[TRADITIONAL] Japanese brewed liquor. This fermented rice alcohol is recommended to be drunk straight to truly appreciate its delicate earthy and umami flavor.
Japanese most popular plum wine. The aromatic fruity fragrance combined with its [DELICATE] sweet and sour taste reminds you of the blossoming flower in spring.
Sweet potato distilled spirit which is quite [STRONG] on its own. Often known as the Japanese equivalent of vodka. Goes great with various mixes.
Lemon flavored shochu. Widely available in canned form, but tastier if mixed in with real fruits. Fun and festive drink that makes any occasion a [FANCY] one. A hit among the youngins.
Often used as a [LUXURIOUS] welcome drink to show the spirit of Bali. Just watch out as it's got a potent kick and you might end up wasted on your way home.
Fermented sticky rice drink commonly used in ceremonies. Often confused with brem cake, which is also made from the same main ingredients. Much more [LIGHT] if compared to Arak.
Good ol' [MILD] and calming green tea to gulp down your meal with. Your go to drink if you want a free refill.
Sugar, spice, and everything [FANCY]. Has "beer" in its name, but definitely won't knock you out. This local Bloody Mary look-alike is so attractive, you'll be wanting for more.
For those [BOLD] souls who think ginger drinks are too basic, this one has chili blended into it. Slightly spicy drink that can be served warm or cold.
Short for Susu Telur Madu Jahe, or directly translates to Milk Egg Honey Ginger. A perfect warm, sweet and [SAVORY] drink in rainy days. Too many eggs, and it will turn into an omelet.
A fun mix of milk, flavored syrup, and soda water. Sweet [DELICATE] soda that makes everybody happy.
This [LIGHT] carbonated soft drink probably has all the flavor you are looking for. Do NOT swallow the marble.

Decorations.description: An e-ink shopfront a-frame sign that can easily be updated while retaining the classic look.
A strong and easy to maintain plant, excellent for indoor decoration.
Beautifully sculpted ceramic jar hand-made by the finest artisan from Bedugul.
Basic rack made of wood. It can be used to display small things on top of it.
Basic rack made of metal, strong enough to hold a baby on top of it.
The writing on it says "Welcome to Oasis".
A carved wooden mask representing the mythical Banaspati Raja.
An intricately detailed wooden mask depicting a mysterious entity.
A carved wooden mask representing the mythical Tengu yokai.
A very old TV that miraculously still turns on. Has no intelligent features at all.
TV for those art snobs.
A trophy made out of blue granite, awarded at the local event several years ago in Sanur.
An exquisite glass sculpture depicting unique contemporary design.
A framed Balinese aksara script, it says "Welcome".
A framed Japanese calligraphy, meaning "Having a sense of purpose in life".
A promotional poster depicting beer filled to the brim.
Four lightboxes with the text "Oasis" written in Japanese.
Various printed infographic about Yakitori and how to make it.
Basic wooden shelf. Can be used to display small things on top of it.
Metal sheet made into shelf. Extra strength.
The wallpaper you install if you're not satisfied with the basic offering.
A standard wallpaper mimicking the common wall design of Japan.

Main.description: Sourced from the free-range farm, guaranteed to be exceptional and nutritious. Goes together with any recipes.
The most common meat type used to make satay. Farmed from the best and juiciest breed. A protein source enjoyed by many.

Seasoning.description: Earthy and aromatic ingredients freshly picked from organic farm, balance and harmonize the flavor. Also adds colorful scene onto your plate.
Prepared by simmering meats and bones in water. Simple effort to give all the goodness of meaty flavor but staying low calories.
Produced through a two-stage fermentation process of distilled alcohol. Is used more for its acidic properties rather than its flavor.
Also known as torch ginger, this flowering plant makes dishes more attractive. The floral undertone sets a unique sensation to the enjoyer.
Sauce made from carefully selected ground peanuts. Versatile in many Asian dishes, velvety and crunchy.
Natural sweet nectar farmed from local bees. Always a number one option for making any dish tastes caramelly and fruity.

KeyItems.description: An old fountain pen with a long family history that is no longer useful in this digital age.
A bracelet, given by Nina herself, showing that you have been accepted as Nina's Fans Club member.
A vial containing aromatic essential oil that relaxes whoever uses it.
An incense burner gifted by Tamara for providing an excellent service. Can be used as decoration.
Cigar Lighter with striking color and anime girl sticker stamped on it.
A drawing of Aldi, Dewi, and %player% in front of the izakaya. Best to frame it first before putting it on display.
A travel brochure for Northern Bali with a discount coupon included.
A parchment containing recipe of Banjarese Satay
Vial shaped necklace pendant containing tamed psionic matter, previously owned by Hana.
A physical book containing the dish and drink Airin needs for open her cafe.
A privkey to what’s left of %player%’s savings from police brigade.
A cheap business holocard displaying Adam Kacey's contact details.

Foods.description: Chicken skewer with crunchy peanut sauce and drizzled lightly with soy sauce. A beloved favorite enjoyed throughout the Nusantara Archipelago.
Foods.description1: Chicken skewers with crunchy peanut sauce, drizzled with soy sauce and extra seasoning to bring out [keyword_1] flavors.
Foods.description2: Chicken skewers with crunchy peanut sauce, drizzled with soy sauce and extra seasoning to bring out [keyword_1] and [keyword_2] flavors.
Foods.description3: Chicken skewers with crunchy peanut sauce, drizzled with soy sauce and extra seasoning to bring out [keyword_1], [keyword_2], and [keyword_3] flavors.

Foods.description: Japanese-style diced wagyu beef skewers and spring onion grilled to delicate perfection with butter. a perfect companion for any drink.
Foods.description1: Japanese-style diced wagyu beef skewers with spring onions, adjusted to be more [keyword_1] upon request.
Foods.description2: Japanese-style diced wagyu beef skewers with spring onions, adjusted to be more [keyword_1] and [keyword_2] upon request.
Foods.description3: Japanese-style diced wagyu beef skewers with spring onions, adjusted to be more [keyword_1], [keyword_2], and [keyword_3] upon request.

Foods.description: Seafood skewers made with the chef’s personal touch. Today’s freshest catch mixed with handpicked spices creates a special flavor you won’t soon forget.
Foods.description1: Seafood skewers made with the chef’s personal touch. Today’s freshest catch mixed with handpicked spices creates a [keyword_1] flavor that stays with you.
Foods.description2: Seafood skewers made with the chef’s personal touch. Today’s freshest catch mixed with handpicked spices creates layer of [keyword_1] and [keyword_2] flavors that leaves a lasting impression.
Foods.description3: Seafood skewers made with the chef’s personal touch. Today’s freshest catch mixed with handpicked spices creates layers of [keyword_1], [keyword_2], and [keyword_3] flavors that stick with you.
